sections.heading: Step 1: Choose a cluster type.
sections.body:
[Clusters](ref-deployment-types)
to select the best cluster type for you.

sections.heading: Step 2: Create the cluster.
sections.body:
[Create a Cluster](create-new-cluster),
or [Create a Global Cluster](create-new-global-write-cluster)
based on your choice of cluster.

sections.heading: Step 3: Connect to the cluster.
sections.body:
[connect to the cluster](connect-to-database-deployment).
You can:

- Browse Data via the Atlas UI.

- Connect to a Cluster via Client Libraries.

- Connect to a Cluster via Compass.

- Connect to a Cluster via mongosh.

- Connect to a Cluster via the BI Connector.
